claim: INTEGERS hard AI ban: will not consider any article that makes use of AI in producing mathematics, code, or content.
AMS journal AI policy (adopted COPE Feb 2023): disclosure required in Methods-equivalent section; AI cannot be co-author.
AMS research journals operate double-anonymous peer review per AMS Council January 2021 decision.
Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society editorial decisions taken normally within a month of receipt.
Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society does not normally accept papers longer than 12 pages.
Cambridge University Press policy accommodates pseudonymous authorship subject to standard responsibilities.
Cambridge University Press AI policy requires declaration; prohibits AI authorship.
INTEGERS is diamond OA (CC BY 4.0); indexed in MathSciNet, zbMATH Open, SCOPUS, DOAJ, FJN.
